title: polypodium filix-mas var. abbreviatum
intro: Polypodium filix-mas var. abbreviatum, also known as the Western polypody or dwarf polypody, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anticoagulant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium filix-mas var. abbreviatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
